  + Exception Group Traceback (most recent call last):
  |   File "/private/tmp/tbsamples/group.py", line 1, in <module>
  |     raise ExceptionGroup("boom", [ValueError("a"), TypeError("b")])
  | ExceptionGroup: boom (2 sub-exceptions)
  +-+---------------- 1 ----------------
    | ValueError: a
    +---------------- 2 ----------------
    | TypeError: b
    +------------------------------------
